description: 50-intent held-out test set for Volta v2 adapter evaluation

cases.prompt: Design a circuit for category passive_rc difficulty easy
cases.gold_skidl:
from skidl import Part, Net, generate_netlist, KICAD, erc
set_default_tool(KICAD)
R1 = Part('Device', 'R', value='1k')
generate_netlist()
